TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Atayal Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://tay.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay, title = {Atayal Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: sakuw sklokah balay hi niqun qu trakis ki sakuw. krawi' hiya' ga, mutu ini' pmhi na bnkis ta' sraral. mutu si phmut hmbku'sa qmayah. hi' nya' ga, m_yan tluling qba'. blaq thkun uzi.
S.PHON: s~ɕakuw s~ɕklokaħ βalaj ħi niqun qu trakis~ɕ ki s~ɕakuw. krawiʔ ħijaʔ ɣa, mutu iniʔ pmħi na βnkis~ɕ taʔ s~ɕraral. mutu s~ɕi pħmut ħmβkuʔs~ɕa qmajaħ. ħiʔ njaʔ ɣa, məjan tluliŋ qβaʔ. βlaq tħkun uzi.
S.FORM: sakuw sklokah balay hi niqun qu trakis ki sakuw. krawi' hiya' ga, mutu ini' pmhi na bnkis ta' sraral. mutu si phmut hmbku'sa qmayah. hi' nya' ga, m_yan tluling qba'. blaq thkun uzi.
S.PHON: s~ɕakuw s~ɕklokaħ βalaj ħi niqun qu trakis~ɕ ki s~ɕakuw. krawiʔ ħijaʔ ɣa, mutu iniʔ pmħi na βnkis~ɕ taʔ s~ɕraral. mutu s~ɕi pħmut ħmβkuʔs~ɕa qmajaħ. ħiʔ njaʔ ɣa, məjan tluliŋ qβaʔ. βlaq tħkun uzi.
